title: Categories
subtitle: Asset category catalog (Super Admin only)
name: Name
errorNameAllLocales: Fill the name in every language
errorPrefixFormat: Prefix must contain only uppercase Latin letters and digits
errorPrefixInUse: This prefix is already used by another category
errorIdConflict: A category with that identifier already exists
fieldDerivedIdHelp: Identifier is auto-generated from the name (latin letters, digits, underscore only)
confirmDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteCascadeBody: Category “{{name}}” contains {{count}} sub-type(s). Deleting the category permanently removes them along with their history. Continue?
errorCategoryReferenced: Category is in use by {{assetCount}} asset(s). Remove or reassign those assets first.
attachableToHelp: Pick which holder kinds assets in this category can be attached to. Sub-types may narrow this set but cannot widen it.
errorAttachableEmpty: Pick at least one holder kind
